reason: Rebuild Rwanda VAT on one reviewed engine across English, French, Swahili and the widget. The engine applies the Article 4 standard rate for add and extract calculations, permits zero-rated or exempt treatment only after an exact current Article 7 or Article 8 basis is confirmed, and screens registration strictly above the RWF 20 million previous-fiscal-year or RWF 5 million preceding-quarter thresholds. It removes arbitrary withholding, automatic category claims, amount storage, AI submission and print-as-PDF. Six unit fixtures and eight browser checks passed; no protected golden fixture existed, so the engine and route digest changes have no carried result delta.
